message: You know those moments when your phone decides to die right when you need it most? I had a day like that recently. I was out for a family hike, and just as I was about to snap a picture of my kids being adorable, my phone battery gave out. No more photos, no GPS, and no way to check in with anyone. Luckily, we had a map and some snacks, which kept the mood light. It made me realize how important it is to have a backup plan in our go-bags — like a portable charger or even a good old-fashioned paper map. It’s those little details that can make a big difference! Have you ever had a tech fail you at the worst possible moment?
